name: Ruby's Lemon Lush
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and flour together. Add the pecans and press into the bottom of a 9x13-inch pan. Bake for 25 minutes until set, then allow to cool.
2. Meanwhile, mix the cream cheese and powdered sugar in a bowl. Stir in one container of Cool Whip. Spread over the cooled crust layer.
3. Mix the lemon instant pudding and milk until thickened. Spread on top of the cream cheese mixture. Then spread the remaining container of Cool Whip on top.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and chill overnight. The dessert can also be frozen for later use. Once chilled, cut into squares before serving.
This recipe was given to me by my step-mother-in-law.
